completed_tasks.name: All 6 phase plans executed (incl. 05-06 gap closure for CR-01 import data loss)
Code review of gap closure — found+fixed orphaned trackedShows on dedupe collapse (clear+bulkPut)
Re-verification: 4/4 must-haves VERIFIED, status human_needed (3 runtime/device UAT items)
HUMAN-UAT Test 2 (suggestion adopt/dismiss + layout stability) — PASSED via automated Playwright drive; found+fixed dismissal slot-freeing bug

remaining_tasks.name: HUMAN-UAT Test 3: end-show auto-backup on installed iOS PWA (needs HTTPS — tunnel or static deploy)
On Test 3 pass: mark 05-HUMAN-UAT.md resolved, re-run/flip verification to passed, run update_roadmap (gsd-tools query phase.complete 05), route to Phase 6

blockers.description: Test 3 requires HTTPS on the iPhone (installed-PWA auto-download + SW). Plain-HTTP LAN (192.168.1.178:4175) is insufficient for a real installed-PWA test.
blockers.workaround: cloudflared/localtunnel/ngrok tunnel to localhost:4175, or push packages/app/dist to a static host (Vercel/Netlify/GH Pages)

human_actions_pending.action: Run UAT Test 3 on iPhone over HTTPS: install PWA, start+end a show, confirm guezzer-backup-YYYY-MM-DD.json auto-downloads with muted confirmation; persist-denied warning at most once
human_actions_pending.context: Last remaining Phase-5 UAT item; phase completion gates on it

decisions.decision: SyncDot online state is hit-green #22C55E (owner override of 05-UI-SPEC §Color B3)
decisions.rationale: Owner explicitly requested green-when-online after on-device testing; reuses CometTrail hit-green, no new token

decisions.decision: ?mockLatest=1 URL flag is a permanent UAT harness
decisions.rationale: Suggestion strip untestable outside live shows; flag stubs only the fetch, real pipeline otherwise; inert without the flag

decisions.decision: Dismissed suggestions free their strip slot (excludeSongIds applied before slot fill in core diff)
decisions.rationale: UAT found post-truncation filtering emptied the strip after 2 dismissals despite queued editor songs

decisions.decision: randomUUID via app-tier fallback helper (crypto.getRandomValues v4) instead of bare crypto.randomUUID
decisions.rationale: crypto.randomUUID is secure-context-only; broke Start Show on plain-HTTP LAN devices

next_action: Set up HTTPS access for the iPhone (tunnel to localhost:4175 or deploy packages/app/dist), then walk the user through UAT Test 3 (end-show auto-backup on installed iOS PWA). On pass: mark 05-HUMAN-UAT.md resolved, flip phase 5 verification to passed, run phase completion (gsd-tools query phase.complete 05), offer Phase 6.
context_notes: Phase 5 execution + gap closure fully done and code-verified (05-VERIFICATION.md: 4/4 must-haves, human_needed only for device checks). Two of three UAT items passed. Local preview servers on 4173 (localhost) and 4175 (LAN 0.0.0.0) serve the current dist; rebuild with 'npm run build' in packages/app before testing if source changed. Session also fixed: stale-dist confusion (SyncDot 'missing'), InstallBanner overlay inset accounting, iOS 100vh min-h-screen, randomUUID secure-context crash. Debug sessions archived in .planning/debug/resolved/.
